Package jline.lang

Class Env

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.Model
      • jline.lang.Ensemble
        • jline.lang.Env
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class Env
extends Ensemble
    An environment model defined by a collection of network sub-models coupled with an environment transition rule that selects the active sub-model.
    See Also:
